checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

Login form at /signin — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

sitemap.xml found with ~1273 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 552 divs with only 15 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 61/427 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)

checks.name: errors
findings: Non-existent path returned 200 instead of 404
Soft 404 detected — returns 200 for missing pages
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~124,712 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 23 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~19,120 tokens (15% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.16–$1.87 per load ($0.78–$9.35 for a 5-page session)
270 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 14 images have alt attributes (14 descriptive, 0 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
1 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 225ms
Moderate payload: 487KB
2 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 10 scripts, 4 styles, 14 images
Compression enabled: gzip
